name.ja: <ruby>蟲<rt>こ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>じん</rt></ruby>の<ruby>色鬼<rt>アシュトラ</rt></ruby> クズハ
name.zh-CN: 蛊神之色艮鬼 葛叶

text.en: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Kuzuha the Bewitching Deity Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Kuzuha the Bewitching Deity Ashtra" once per turn. You can target up to 1 card on the field for every 2 face-down cards on the field; destroy them. During your End Phase: You can target 1 "Ashtra" Trap in your GY; Set it.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名以①方法的特殊召唤1回合仅可进行1次，且②③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡可通过将自己场上的1张里侧表示卡出示给对手并放回手牌・额外牌组，来从手牌特殊召唤。②：场上的里侧表示卡每有2张，就以场上的最多1张卡为对象可以发动。将该卡破坏。③：在自己的结束阶段，以自己墓地的1张“艮鬼”陷阱卡为对象可以发动。将该卡放置在自己场上。
